name: Banana-Blueberry Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Lightly grease 12 2-1/2 inch muffin cups.
3. In a bowl, combine flour, baking powder, salt, and cinnamon.
4. In a large bowl, beat bananas until mashed.
5. Add eggs, brown sugar, butter, and vanilla; beat until blended.
6. Stir in the combined dry ingredients with a wooden spoon until just blended.
7. Stir in blueberries until just combined.
8. Spoon batter into prepared muffin cups, dividing evenly.
9. Sprinkle tops of muffins with granulated sugar.
10. Bake 20-22 minutes, or until golden brown.
11. Remove muffins from pan and cool on a wire rack.
